_doc: Act IV ablation results. Each entry's pass@1 / cost / latency are produced by running the pinned τ²-Bench retail harness on the named slice (sealed held-out for the headline result). The day1_baseline row is the authoritative tutor-published Act I run; method and ablations are computed against the same 30 dev tasks for hyperparameter selection and against the 20-task sealed held-out for Delta A.

conditions.label: Honesty Gate + Tone-Preservation Re-check
conditions.notes: Pending Day-6 sealed held-out run. Pre-run estimate +3 to +6 pp Delta A vs day1_baseline; see method.md §Expected outcomes.

conditions.label: Honesty Gate only (no tone re-check)
conditions.notes: Pending. Tests whether the lift comes from the directive itself or the regeneration loop.

conditions.label: Tone re-check only (no honesty gate)
conditions.notes: Pending. Tests whether downstream filtering can substitute for upstream prompt shaping.

conditions.label: Full mechanism with temperature=0.0
conditions.notes: Pending. Tests whether residual errors are sampling noise or systematic.

delta_a_plan.comparison: method vs day1_baseline on sealed held-out slice
delta_a_plan.decision_rule: claim positive lift only if 95% CI lower bound on Delta A >= 0
delta_a_plan.anti_overclaim: if Delta A CI crosses zero, report point estimate + CI and label 'no significant lift' in the memo
